content.claim: Hungary's 6- and 8-year gimnázium tracks are codified in primary legislation (Act CXC of 2011 on National Public Education), meaning any structural change requires parliamentary amendment rather than ministerial decree.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: This establishes legal form, not policy desirability.
The Act permits but does not mandate the 6/8-year variants; reform could occur through legislative amendment without constitutional violation.
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
